div.head: NSR-14 - April 03, 1989 - Review of U.S. Arms Control Policies [5]Source: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSR Files, OA/ID 90006-029, NSR-14-April 03, 1989-Review of U.S. Arms Control Policies [5]. Secret. Copied to Quayle and Sununu. A stamped notation indicates Bush saw the memorandum; an unknown hand wrote "6/20/89" beneath the notation.
div.p: 4 SECRET RECORD ID: 8920674 - NSC/RMO PROFILE RECEIVED: 19 JUN 89 08 TO: PRESIDENT FROM: SCOWCROFT DOC DATE: 19 JUN 89 SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: START NST ARMS CONTROL SPACE POLICY NSR PERSONS: SUBJECT: US POSITIONS IN START & DST TALKS ACTION: NOTED BY PRES DUE DATE: 07 FEB 91 STATUS: C | STAFF E s LOGREF: | FI \ ii, R ___NSCP: ree CODES: | ge ocunent DISTRIBUTION | FOR ACTION FOR_CONCURRENCE FOR_INFO DAVIS NSC CHRON cae -7/a)i0 | COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DAT! BY HAND W/ATTCH | OPENED BY: AC CLOSED BY: A poc oor

--SEERER- RECORD 1058920674 qe? NSC/RMO PROFILE RECEIVED: 19 JUN 89 08 TO: SCOWCROFT FROM: DAVIS DOC DATE: 17 JUN 89 KANTER SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: START NST ARMS CONTROL SPACE POLICY NSR PERSONS: SUBJECT: NST DECISIONS | ACTION: SCOWCROFT APPROVED RECOM RE DST DUE DATE: 07 FEB 91 STATUS: C | STAFF OFFICER: DAVIS LOGREF: | FILES: IFR_O NSCP: NSROO14 CODES: aa DOCUMENT DISTRIBUTION FOR_ACTION FOR_CONCURRENCE FOR_INFO DAVIS KANTER NSC CHRON car 7elio COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: AC CLOSED BY: AC bp boc (20 3 --SEERET--

t National Security Council i The White House PROOFED BY: wl LOG # 2 6 w { URGENT NOT PROOFED: SYSTEM PRS BYPASSED WW DESK: DOCLO! SEQUENCE TO HAS SEEN DISPOSITION Dep Exec \ S Philip Hughes 2 i ney PER, Sirs Bob Gates 2 22 Brent Scowcroft °* ey PhilipHughes ~ g bb 2 & ,. bk Situation Room => West Wing Desk~> L a) NSC Secretariat sted ] ; ETSI cs ees 2 eS Pts SE esses 7 'cetenain nh eaten Actor cc: vp Sununu Other: Should be seen by: --Datertime) ae COMMENTS

- -SRERET-- NATIONAL SECURITY COUNCIL 20674 WASHINGTON, D.C. 20506 add-on June 17, 1989 ACTION MEMORANDUM FOR BRENT SCOWCROFT THROUGH: ARNOLD KANTER|| eh FROM: RICHARD DAVISRW SUBJECT: NST Decisions At Tab I is a package of NST issues for decision that we did not include in our June 16 memorandum for you to send to the President. We recommend that you discuss these issues with the President in general terms, but not go through the package in detail. All issues have been reviewed by the Deputies Committee who agree that the interagency papers fairly present the options for decision. This package and the June 16 decision package for the President include all of the decisions needed for Geneva. We need decisions on these issues urgently, so we can send instructions to our negotiators in Geneva. Bob Blackwill snk rebar Rice concur. RECOMMENDATION That you make decisions on the START and Defense & Space issues presented at Tab I. Approve Disapprove Tab I Decision Paper DECLASSIFIED | White House Guidelines E.O. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B), September 11, 2006 By cap___ NARA, Date 7/8 [10 Declassify on: OADR SEGRET-
